scripts.name: Test
scripts.content:
-- [[ ANSCRIPT HUB V2 - FULL CUSTOM UI CODE (FIXED & PROTECTED) ]]
local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Clipboard = setclipboard or syn.write_clipboard or function(text) print("Copied: " .. tostring(text)) end

-- 1. XÓA UI CŨ ĐỂ KHÔNG BỊ TRÙNG LẶP
if CoreGui:FindFirstChild("AnscriptHub_CustomUI") then
    CoreGui["AnscriptHub_CustomUI"]:Destroy()
end

-- 2. KÉO DỮ LIỆU TỪ SERVER (CÓ CƠ CHẾ DỰ PHÒNG KHI RENDER CHẾT)
local serverUrl = "https://anscripthubv2.onrender.com/raw-hub"
local httpSuccess, rawText = pcall(function()
    return game:HttpGet(serverUrl)
end)

local HubData
if httpSuccess and rawText and rawText ~= "" then
    local compileSuccess, result = pcall(function()
        return loadstring(rawText)()
    end)
    if compileSuccess and type(result) == "table" then
        HubData = result
    end
end

-- Nếu không kết nối được server, tự nạp data mẫu để UI LUÔN LUÔN HIỆN LÊN
if not HubData then
    warn("⚠️ Không kết nối được Server Render! Đang chạy chế độ UI Dự Phòng (Offline Mode).")
    HubData = {
        Info = { Name = "Anscript Hub (Offline)", Version = "v2.5", Creator = "An Bro", ImageId = "rbxassetid://108283706041690", ThemeColor = {0, 173, 181} },
        HomeTab = {
            Introduction = "Server Render hiện tại không phản hồi (có thể đang ngủ). UI tự động bật chế độ Offline để bro kiểm tra giao diện trước!",
            Elements = {
                { type = "label", text = "Lưu ý: Hãy truy cập link Render trên trình duyệt để kích hoạt server." },
                { type = "copy_button", text = "Sao chép Link Web Admin", link = "https://anscripthubv2.onrender.com" }
            }
        },
        Tabs = {
            {
                Name = "Mẫu Test Game",
                Sections = {
                    {
                        Name = "Tính năng Test",
                        Scripts = {
                            { Name = "Test Print Script", Desc = "Ấn vào sẽ in ra dòng chữ trong F9", Content = "print('--> Script hoạt động ngon lành cành đào nha bro!')" }
                        }
                    }
                },
                StandaloneScripts = {
                    { Name = "Script Ngoài Mục", Desc = "Ví dụ về script không nằm trong mục nào", Content = "print('Script ngoài mục!')" }
                }
            }
        }
    }
end

-- BỌC LỖI TÌM CHỈ SỐ (INDEX NIL) KHI KHỞI TẠO MÀU SẮC CHỦ ĐỀ
local defaultColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 173, 181)
local themeColor = defaultColor

if HubData and HubData.Info and HubData.Info.ThemeColor and type(HubData.Info.ThemeColor) == "table" then
    themeColor = Color3.fromRGB(
        HubData.Info.ThemeColor[1] or 0, 
        HubData.Info.ThemeColor[2] or 173, 
        HubData.Info.ThemeColor[3] or 181
    )
end

-- 3. DỰNG KHUNG MÀN HÌNH (SCREEN GUI)
local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
ScreenGui.Name = "AnscriptHub_CustomUI"
ScreenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
ScreenGui.Parent = CoreGui

-- BẢNG CHÍNH (MAIN FRAME)
local MainFrame = Instance.new("Frame")
MainFrame.Name = "MainFrame"
MainFrame.Size = UDim2.new(0, 580, 0, 380)
MainFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -290, 0.5, -190)
MainFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(20, 20, 20)
MainFrame.BackgroundTransparency = 0.2
MainFrame.BorderSizePixel = 0
MainFrame.Active = true
MainFrame.Draggable = true
MainFrame.Parent = ScreenGui

local MainCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
MainCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10)
MainCorner.Parent = MainFrame

-- THANH TOPBAR
local Topbar = Instance.new("Frame")
Topbar.Name = "Topbar"
Topbar.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 45)
Topbar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30, 30, 30)
Topbar.BackgroundTransparency = 0.4
Topbar.BorderSizePixel = 0
Topbar.Parent = MainFrame

local TopbarCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
TopbarCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10)
TopbarCorner.Parent = Topbar

-- Ảnh ID trên Topbar
local HubImage = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
HubImage.Size = UDim2.new(0, 30, 0, 30)
HubImage.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 7.5)
HubImage.BackgroundTransparency = 1
HubImage.Image = (HubData and HubData.Info and HubData.Info.ImageId) or "rbxassetid://108283706041690"
HubImage.Parent = Topbar

-- Tiêu đề: <name> | <vision> | <cre>
local TitleLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
TitleLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 240, 1, 0)
TitleLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 50, 0, 0)
TitleLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
TitleLabel.Text = string.format("%s | %s | %s", 
    (HubData and HubData.Info and HubData.Info.Name) or "Anscript Hub", 
    (HubData and HubData.Info and HubData.Info.Version) or "1.0", 
    (HubData and HubData.Info and HubData.Info.Creator) or "An"
)
TitleLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
TitleLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
TitleLabel.TextSize = 14
TitleLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
TitleLabel.Parent = Topbar

-- KHUNG TÌM KIẾM TRÊN TOPBAR
local SearchBox = Instance.new("TextBox")
SearchBox.Name = "SearchBox"
SearchBox.Size = UDim2.new(0, 140, 0, 26)
SearchBox.Position = UDim2.new(0, 300, 0, 9.5)
SearchBox.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(45, 45, 45)
SearchBox.PlaceholderText = "Tìm script nhanh..."
SearchBox.Text = ""
SearchBox.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
SearchBox.TextSize = 13
SearchBox.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
SearchBox.Parent = Topbar

local SearchCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
SearchCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
SearchCorner.Parent = SearchBox

-- CÁC NÚT ĐIỀU KHIỂN (XÓA UI, ẨN UI, ĐỔI MÀU)
local CloseBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
CloseBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 26, 0, 26)
CloseBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -35, 0, 9.5)
CloseBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(200, 50, 50)
CloseBtn.Text = "X"
CloseBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
CloseBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
CloseBtn.TextSize = 12
CloseBtn.Parent = Topbar

local CloseCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
CloseCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
CloseCorner.Parent = CloseBtn
CloseBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() ScreenGui:Destroy() end)

-- NÚT ẨN (-) CẠNH NÚT XÓA UI
local MinimizeBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
MinimizeBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 26, 0, 26)
MinimizeBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -66, 0, 9.5)
MinimizeBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(60, 60, 60)
MinimizeBtn.Text = "-"
MinimizeBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
MinimizeBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
MinimizeBtn.TextSize = 14
MinimizeBtn.Parent = Topbar

local MinCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
MinCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
MinCorner.Parent = MinimizeBtn
MinimizeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() MainFrame.Visible = false end)

-- NÚT BẢNG MÀU 🎨
local ColorBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
ColorBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 26, 0, 26)
ColorBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -97, 0, 9.5)
ColorBtn.BackgroundColor3 = themeColor
ColorBtn.Text = "🎨"
ColorBtn.TextSize = 12
ColorBtn.Parent = Topbar

local ColorBtnCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
ColorBtnCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
ColorBtnCorner.Parent = ColorBtn

-- BẢNG ĐỔI MÀU NHANH XUẤT HIỆN KHI ẤN NÚT 🎨
local ColorPanel = Instance.new("Frame")
ColorPanel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 155, 0, 35)
ColorPanel.Position = UDim2.new(1, -165, 0, 45)
ColorPanel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(35, 35, 35)
ColorPanel.Visible = false
ColorPanel.ZIndex = 5
ColorPanel.Parent = MainFrame

local ColorGrid = Instance.new("UIGridLayout")
ColorGrid.CellSize = UDim2.new(0, 25, 0, 25)
ColorGrid.Padding = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, 5)
ColorGrid.Parent = ColorPanel

-- KHU VỰC CHỨA PANEL TABS (BÊN TRÁI) & NỘI DUNG (BÊN PHẢI)
local TabPanel = Instance.new("Frame")
TabPanel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 130, 1, -45)
TabPanel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 45)
TabPanel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(15, 15, 15)
TabPanel.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
TabPanel.Parent = MainFrame

local TabListLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
TabListLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 5)
TabListLayout.Parent = TabPanel

local ContentPanel = Instance.new("Frame")
ContentPanel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -130, 1, -45)
ContentPanel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 130, 0, 45)
ContentPanel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
ContentPanel.Parent = MainFrame

local allScriptBlocks = {}
local themeObjects = {} 

local function registerThemeObject(obj, prop)
    table.insert(themeObjects, {Object = obj, Property = prop})
end

local function updateThemeColor(newColor)
    themeColor = newColor
    ColorBtn.BackgroundColor3 = newColor
    for _, item in ipairs(themeObjects) do
        if item.Object and item.Object.Parent then
            item.Object[item.Property] = newColor
        end
    end
end

local colorPresets = {
    Color3.fromRGB(0, 173, 181),   
    Color3.fromRGB(255, 85, 85),   
    Color3.fromRGB(85, 255, 85),   
    Color3.fromRGB(255, 170, 0),   
    Color3.fromRGB(170, 85, 255)   
}

for _, col in ipairs(colorPresets) do
    local CBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    CBtn.BackgroundColor3 = col
    CBtn.Text = ""
    CBtn.Parent = ColorPanel
    Instance.new("UICorner", CBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    CBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        updateThemeColor(col)
        ColorPanel.Visible = false
    end)
end
ColorBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() ColorPanel.Visible = not ColorPanel.Visible end)

-- HÀM TẠO TRANG CUỘN NỘI DUNG SCRIPT
local function createPage()
    local Page = Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
    Page.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    Page.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    Page.BorderSizePixel = 0
    Page.ScrollBarThickness = 4
    Page.Visible = false
    Page.Parent = ContentPanel
    
    local Layout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
    Layout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 8)
    Layout.Parent = Page
    
    local Padding = Instance.new("UIPadding")
    Padding.PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, 10)
    Padding.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 10)
    Padding.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 10)
    Padding.Parent = Page

    Layout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function()
        Page.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, Layout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 25)
    end)
    return Page
end

-- HÀM THÊM KHỐI SCRIPT VÀO UI
local function addScriptBlock(parentFrame, name, desc, contentString)
    if not name or not contentString then return end
    
    local Block = Instance.new("TextButton")
    Block.Name = tostring(name)
    Block.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 50)
    Block.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(35, 35, 35)
    Block.BackgroundTransparency = 0.4
    Block.Text = ""
    Block.Parent = parentFrame

    local BlockCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    BlockCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
    BlockCorner.Parent = Block

    local ScriptName = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    ScriptName.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 25)
    ScriptName.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 3)
    ScriptName.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    ScriptName.Text = tostring(name)
    ScriptName.TextColor3 = themeColor
    ScriptName.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
    ScriptName.TextSize = 15
    ScriptName.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    ScriptName.Parent = Block
    registerThemeObject(ScriptName, "TextColor3")

    local ScriptDesc = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    ScriptDesc.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 20)
    ScriptDesc.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 23)
    ScriptDesc.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    ScriptDesc.Text = desc or "Không có mô tả."
    ScriptDesc.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(180, 180, 180)
    ScriptDesc.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    ScriptDesc.TextSize = 13
    ScriptDesc.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    ScriptDesc.Parent = Block

    table.insert(allScriptBlocks, {Instance = Block, Name = tostring(name):lower()})

    Block.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        local compiledFunc, compileErr = loadstring(contentString)
        if compiledFunc then
            local successRun, runErr = pcall(compiledFunc)
            if not successRun then warn("❌ Lỗi khi chạy script ["..name.."]: " .. tostring(runErr)) end
        else
            warn("❌ Lỗi biên dịch script ["..name.."]: " .. tostring(compileErr))
        end
    end)
end

-- ==================== DỰNG TAB HOME RIÊNG BIỆT ====================
local HomeBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
HomeBtn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 35)
HomeBtn.BackgroundColor3 = themeColor
HomeBtn.Text = "🏠 Home"
HomeBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
HomeBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
HomeBtn.TextSize = 14
HomeBtn.Parent = TabPanel
registerThemeObject(HomeBtn, "BackgroundColor3")

local HomePage = createPage()
HomePage.Visible = true

local IntroLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
IntroLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 45)
IntroLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
IntroLabel.Text = (HubData and HubData.HomeTab and HubData.HomeTab.Introduction) or "Không có lời giới thiệu."
IntroLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(220, 220, 220)
IntroLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansItalic
IntroLabel.TextSize = 14
IntroLabel.TextWrapped = true
IntroLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
IntroLabel.Parent = HomePage

if HubData and HubData.HomeTab and HubData.HomeTab.Elements then
    for _, el in ipairs(HubData.HomeTab.Elements) do
        if el.type == "label" then
            local Lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
            Lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
            Lbl.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30, 30, 30)
            Lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
            Lbl.Text = "  📌  " .. el.text
            Lbl.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(200, 200, 200)
            Lbl.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
            Lbl.TextSize = 13
            Lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
            Lbl.Parent = HomePage
            Instance.new("UICorner", Lbl).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
        elseif el.type == "copy_button" then
            local Cpy = Instance.new("TextButton")
            Cpy.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 35)
            Cpy.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(45, 45, 45)
            Cpy.Text = "🔗 " .. el.text .. " (Click để Copy)"
            Cpy.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
            Cpy.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
            Cpy.TextSize = 13
            Cpy.Parent = HomePage
            Instance.new("UICorner", Cpy).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
            
            Cpy.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                Clipboard(el.link)
                Cpy.Text = "✓ Đã sao chép thành công liên kết!"
                task.wait(1.5)
                Cpy.Text = "🔗 " .. el.text .. " (Click để Copy)"
            end)
        end
    end
end

-- ==================== DỰNG CÁC TAB CHỨA SCRIPT TỪ SERVER ====================
if HubData and HubData.Tabs then
    for _, tabData in ipairs(HubData.Tabs) do
        local TabBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
        TabBtn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 35)
        TabBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40)
        TabBtn.Text = tabData.Name or "Tab"
        TabBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(200, 200, 200)
        TabBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
        TabBtn.TextSize = 14
        TabBtn.Parent = TabPanel
        Instance.new("UICorner", TabBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
        
        local Page = createPage()
        
        TabBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            for _, p in ipairs(ContentPanel:GetChildren()) do p.Visible = false end
            for _, t in ipairs(TabPanel:GetChildren()) do 
                if t:IsA("TextButton") and t ~= HomeBtn then t.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40) end 
            end
            HomeBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40)
            Page.Visible = true
            TabBtn.BackgroundColor3 = themeColor
        end)

        -- Tạo cấu trúc Mục Thả Rộng / Co Ngắn (Sections)
        if tabData.Sections then
            for _, secData in ipairs(tabData.Sections) do
                local SecFrame = Instance.new("Frame")
                SecFrame.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
                SecFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(28, 28, 28)
                SecFrame.BackgroundTransparency = 0.4
                SecFrame.ClipsDescendants = true
                SecFrame.Parent = Page

                Instance.new("UICorner", SecFrame).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
                local SecLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
                SecLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 5)
                SecLayout.Parent = SecFrame

                local SecTitle = Instance.new("TextButton")
                SecTitle.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
                SecTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                SecTitle.Text = "   ▶   " .. (secData.Name or "Section")
                SecTitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(230, 230, 230)
                SecTitle.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
                SecTitle.TextSize = 14
                SecTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
                SecTitle.Parent = SecFrame

                if secData.Scripts then
                    for _, scr in ipairs(secData.Scripts) do
                        local name = scr.Name or scr.name
                        local desc = scr.Desc or scr.desc
                        local content = scr.Content or scr.content
                        addScriptBlock(SecFrame, name, desc, content)
                    end
                end

                local isExpanded = false
                SecTitle.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                    isExpanded = not isExpanded
                    if isExpanded then
                        SecTitle.Text = "   ▼   " .. (secData.Name or "Section")
                        SecFrame.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, SecLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 6)
                    else
                        SecTitle.Text = "   ▶   " .. (secData.Name or "Section")
                        SecFrame.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
                    end
                end)
                
                SecLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function()
                    if isExpanded then SecFrame.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, SecLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 6) end
                end)
            end
        end

        -- Dành cho các script đứng độc lập
        if tabData.StandaloneScripts then
            for _, scr in ipairs(tabData.StandaloneScripts) do
                local name = scr.Name or scr.name
                local desc = scr.Desc or scr.desc
                local content = scr.Content or scr.content
                addScriptBlock(Page, name, desc, content)
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Click nút Home để quay về trang chủ
HomeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    for _, p in ipairs(ContentPanel:GetChildren()) do p.Visible = false end
    for _, t in ipairs(TabPanel:GetChildren()) do if t:IsA("TextButton") then t.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40) end end
    HomePage.Visible = true
    HomeBtn.BackgroundColor3 = themeColor
end)

-- 4. HỆ THỐNG TÌM KIẾM SCRIPT REAL-TIME THEO TỪ KHÓA
SearchBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(function()
    local filter = SearchBox.Text:lower()
    for _, item in ipairs(allScriptBlocks) do
        if filter == "" or string.find(item.Name, filter) then
            item.Instance.Visible = true
        else
            item.Instance.Visible = false
        end
    end
end)

-- 5. NÚT KHỞI TẠO ĐỂ MỞ LẠI KHI BẤM ẨN (-)
local ToggleBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
ToggleBtn.Name = "Anscript_ToggleButton"
ToggleBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 50, 0, 50)
ToggleBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 15, 0.45, 0)
ToggleBtn.BackgroundColor3 = themeColor
ToggleBtn.Text = "OPEN"
ToggleBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
ToggleBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
ToggleBtn.TextSize = 13
ToggleBtn.Active = true
ToggleBtn.Draggable = true
ToggleBtn.Parent = ScreenGui

local ToggleCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
ToggleCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 25)
ToggleCorner.Parent = ToggleBtn

registerThemeObject(ToggleBtn, "BackgroundColor3")

ToggleBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    MainFrame.Visible = not MainFrame.Visible
end)
